mapper.select: select channelId, channelName, channelCode, host, port, userId, userAccount, password, sender, apiKey, status, template from ( SELECT t1.channel_id as channelId, t1.channel_name as channelName, t1.channel_code as channelCode, t1.host as host, t1.port as port, t1.user_id as userId, t1.user_account as userAccount, t1.`password` as password, t1.sender as sender, t1.api_key as apiKey, t1.status as status, t1.template as template, CASE WHEN t1.updated_time IS NOT NULL THEN t1.updated_time ELSE t1.created_time END AS operatorTime FROM mail_channel_config t1, mail_site_link t2 WHERE t1.channel_code = t2.channel_code AND site_code = #{siteCode} AND t1.`status` = 1 and t2.status = 1 ) t3 order by t3.operatorTime desc LIMIT 1

select t.site_code as siteCode, s.site_name AS siteName, s.remark as remark from mail_site_link t left join mail_channel_config c on t.channel_code =c.channel_code left join site_info s on s.site_code = t.site_code where c.id = #{id}
